text:
In this chapter:

(1) “Commission” means the Texas Transportation Commission.

(2) “Fund” means the ship channel improvement revolving fund.

(3) Repealed by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 20.001 (Certain Carriers Exempt from Gross Receipts Taxes) , eff. September 1, 2021.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 56. Funding of Ship Channel Improvements
##### § 56.001 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Commission” means the Texas Transportation Commission.

    (2) “Fund” means the ship channel improvement revolving fund.

    (3) Repealed by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 20.001 (Certain Carriers Exempt from Gross Receipts Taxes) , eff. September 1, 2021.

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B.3607), Sec. 20.001, eff. September 1, 2021.*

subsections.text: “Fund” means the ship channel improvement revolving fund.
Repealed by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 20.001 (Certain Carriers Exempt from Gross Receipts Taxes) , eff. September 1, 2021.
